title: How To Make a Vegan Cake
description:
Today I show you how to make a delicious vegan chocolate cake. You won't believe this cake is vegan! It tastes and looks identical to a normal chocolate cake, except it's way healthier and doesn't contain a single trace of any animal products. It's quick & easy to make, no previous experience necessary. Think vegan food isn't tasty? Think again. 

Ingredients:
1 1/2 cups (360 ml) original unsweetened Almond Breeze Almond Milk
2 tsp white or apple cider vinegar
1 1/4 cups (307 g) unsweetened applesauce
1/2 cup (120 ml) strong brewed coffee (or sub more almond milk)
2/3 cup (160 ml) melted coconut oil, or sub grape seed or canola oil
2 tsp pure vanilla extract
2 cups + 2 Tbsp (320 g) whole-wheat pastry flour or unbleached all-purpose flour
1 1/3 cups (266 g) organic cane sugar (or sub granulated sugar)
1 cup (96 g) unsweetened cocoa powder
2 tsp baking soda
1 tsp baking powder
1/4 tsp salt

title: Electrical experiments with plants that count and communicate | Greg Gage
description:
Neuroscientist Greg Gage takes sophisticated equipment used to study the brain out of graduate-level labs and brings them to middle- and high-school classrooms (and, sometimes, to the TED stage.) Prepare to be amazed as he hooks up the Mimosa pudica, a plant whose leaves close when touched, and the Venus flytrap to an EKG to show us how plants use electrical signals to convey information, prompt movement and even count.

Check out more TED Talks: http://www.ted.com

The TED Talks channel features the best talks and performances from the TED Conference, where the world's leading thinkers and doers give the talk of their lives in 18 minutes (or less). Look for talks on Technology, Entertainment and Design -- plus science, business, global issues, the arts and more.

Following is the transcript of the video:

What happens to your body when you go vegan?

Thinking of making the jump to a vegan diet? You’re not alone.

In your first few weeks, you may feel especially tired. Without meat, vegans often have a hard time getting enough vitamin B12 and iron, which helps make red blood cells and transport oxygen throughout the body. But it’s nothing a supplement or handful of nuts can’t fix.

You may also discover that foods don’t taste the way they used to. That’s because your zinc levels have taken a hit, affecting your overall sense of taste and smell.

On the plus side, expect to lose some weight right away! After switching, new vegans lost an average of 10 pounds over a 10 month period. Plus, a 2009 study found that average BMI was lower for vegans than all other diets.

title: Gotta Have It Vegan Mac 'N' Cheese
description:
Check out the Tasty One-Stop Shop for cookbooks, aprons, hats, and more at TastyShop.com: http://bit.ly/2mEBY0e


Here is what you'll need!

VEGAN MAC ‘N’ CHEESE
Serves 4

INGREDIENTS
2 yellow potatoes, peeled and cubed
1 medium carrot, peeled and cut into 1-inch pieces
1 medium onion, peeled and quartered
½ cup cashews
1 teaspoon salt
1 teaspoon garlic powder
1 teaspoon onion powder
2 tablespoon nutritional yeast
1 pound macaroni, cooked 

Garnish 
Paprika

PREPARATION
Add vegetables to a large pot or Dutch oven of boiling water. Cover and allow the vegetables to cook for 10 minutes, until the potatoes are fork-tender.
Remove boiled vegetables from water and save 1½ - 2 cups of the water. 
Add vegetables, cashews, and seasonings to a blender with half of the reserved water. Blend, adding a few tablespoons of water at a time until the desired consistency is achieved.  
Pour vegetable puree over the macaroni and stir to incorporate before serving.
Enjoy!

title: La diferencia entre célula animal y vegetal que todos confunden
description:
Este vídeo educativo de Academia Internet explica las semejanzas y diferencias entre las células animales y vegetales, ambas clasificadas como eucariotas (con núcleo verdadero).
Semejanzas clave (0:36 - 2:02):
Ambas poseen membrana plasmática, citoplasma y ribosomas.
Comparten orgánulos como el núcleo (con el nucléolo), la mitocondria (para producir energía ATP), el retículo endoplásmico y el aparato de Golgi.
Diferencias clave (2:03 - 7:35):

Célula Vegetal: Cuenta con cloroplastos (para la fotosíntesis), una gran vacuola central para almacenamiento y mantenimiento de la turgencia, y una pared celular rígida de celulosa. También presenta plasmodesmos para conectar células vecinas.
Célula Animal: Presenta lisosomas (para la digestión celular), centriolos (precursores de cilios y flagelos) y carece de pared celular.
El vídeo concluye resumiendo la estructura eucariota y la importancia de estos orgánulos para la vida celular.

title: Plant Growth: Auxins and Gibberellins | Plants | Biology | FuseSchool
description:
Plant Growth: Auxins and Gibberellins | Plants | Biology | FuseSchool

If a plant has enough water, minerals and energy, it will grow, right? Well, sort of… but there is more to it - like why do plants bend towards the light and not just grow straight? And why does the stem grow up but the roots grow down? It isn’t as if a plant has eyes to tell it where the sun is. 

Plants are packed full of hormones, sending messages around to its different parts. Where humans have the creatively named ‘growth hormone’, plants have hormones called auxins. 

Auxin is produced in the stem tips and roots, and controls the direction of growth in response to different stimuli including light and gravity. Having been made in the tips of the stems and roots, auxin is moved in solution by diffusion to older parts of the plant. In the stem, the auxin causes the cells to change in elasticity. More elastic cells absorb more water, and can grow longer. 

Strangely, though, stems and roots respond differently to
tags_str: science; biology; learn; revision; GCSE; AQA; high school; student; fuseschool; school science; school biology; gcse biology; high school biology; tropism; positive tropism; negative tropism; phototropism; geotropism; plant growth; how plants grow; light sensitivity; auxins; gibberellins; hormones; plant hormones; germination; uses of plant hormones
summary: And why does the stem grow up but the roots grow down? In the stem, the auxin causes the cells to change in elasticity. The bending happens because the light hits the one side more and breaks down the auxins in that side of the stem. This enables the ‘light’ side of the roots to grow more and bend away from the light.

1/2 cup fresh mint (chopped)
1/2 cup fresh parsley (chopped)
Pinch salt

1/2 cup pomegranate seeds

title: Bu Bitkinin İçinde Elektrik Devresi Var! (Küstüm Çiçeği)
description:
Küstüm çiçeğinin (Mimosa pudica) dokunmaya verdiği o büyüleyici tepkiyi hepimiz biliriz. Peki bu bitkinin aslında elektronikle çok derin bir bağı olduğunu biliyor muydunuz?
Küstüm çiçeği, yapraklarındaki hareketi tıpkı insan sinir sisteminde veya bir elektronik devrede olduğu gibi elektriksel sinir sinyalleri (aksiyon potansiyeli) ile iletir. Dokunma hissi bir sensör gibi algılanır, elektriksel sinyal gövde boyunca taşınır ve hidrolik bir tetikleyici gibi yaprakların kapanmasını sağlar.
Not: Kamera odak problemi için üzgünüm :/
#bitkiler #ilginçbilgiler #biyoloji

description:

Dhal, or is it daal, dal or dahl? Who really knows? However it’s spelt, this famous Indian dish is a real favourite in our household, and it’s about time we tried mastering it for ourselves.

Packed with protein and nutrients, this dhal recipe is simple, warming and a go-to for anyone who loves Indian cuisine as much as we do.

We serve our dhal with chutney and poppadoms, and sometimes rice if we’re feeling a bit peckish!

Enjoy.

Roxy & Ben

title: How To Make a Vegan Curry
description:
Today I show you how to make a delicious Vegan curry. You won't believe it's vegan! It tastes & looks identical to meat, except there are no traces of meat in this curry whatsoever. Thinking of becoming vegan? Try this recipe out! You won't regret it. Enjoy!

Ingredients:
1 Cup - Basmati Rice
Pinch of Salt
2 Onions
2 Clove Garlic
1/2 Lime
1 tbsp Curry paste
1 Cup Chickpeas
1 Bell pepper 
2 tbsp Soy Sauce
2 Tomatoes
1 Cup Basil leaves
1 Cup Mushrooms
250g Tofu
2 Can Coconut Milk
Chilli Powder

title: Selbstversuch: 2 Wochen vegan leben – wie ist das? || PULS Reportage
description:
Vegan Leben – der Selbstversuch! Sebastian hat ausgemistet und möchte die kommenden zwei Wochen vegan leben. Worauf muss er achten? Was ist besonders schwierig und wie gefällt es ihm?

Vegan leben ist mehr als nur vegan essen. Das hat Sebastian schon in der letzten PULS Reportage zum Thema „Vegan leben: Das kommt alles weg“ gelernt und ausgemistet. In dieser Reportage probiert er nun aus, wie es ist, zwei Wochen komplett vegan zu leben. Er wird also nicht nur vegan essen, sondern auch selbst vegan kochen, vegane Rezepte recherchieren und vegane Kleidung tragen. 

Um die Veganer-Challenge gut zu bestehen, bekommt er Rat von Vegan-Expertin Claudia, die schon seit über acht Jahren vegan lebt. Sie kennt die besten veganen Rezepte und weiß wie man es schafft, vegane Gerichte nicht als Ersatz zuzubereiten, sondern als eigene Mahlzeit. Leckeren veganen Kuchen backen kann sie natürlich auch! 

Außerdem probiert Sebastian verschiedene vegane Produkte im Bad aus und fragt nach, wieso Hygieneprod

title: GLACÉ DE LEITE MOÇA GORDURA VEGETAL E GLAÇÚCAR
description:
Glacê de leite moça  gordura vegetal  e Glaçúcar  #GLACÊ #GLACÊHIDROGENADO #Leitemoça #Glaçúcar #Gorduravegetal 
500 gr de Gordura vegetal (hidrogenada)gelada  . Marcas: Mesa / Primor / Saúde  
3 colheres de (sopa) de suco de limão ou 1 colher de chá de essência  ou 1 colher de (sopa) de pó para sorvete sabor a gosto.
395 gr de leite condensado  (Moça) 
750 gr de glaçúcar (União) ou açúcar de confeiteiro 
1 colher de (sopa ) de pó de merengue ou 1 clara de ovo 
Corante em gel  para colorir (azul Royal)
Bico : 1M
Preparo: bata primeira a gordura por 10 minutos 
Adicione os demais ingrediente e bata por mais 5 minutos.
Pode congelar por 3 meses 
Refrigeração até 2 semanas ou mais em pote com tampa (caso não seja feito com clara de ovo) 

Atenciosamente

title: Banana Pancakes | Deliciously Ella | Vegan & Gluten Free
description:
Easy vegan banana and cinnamon pancakes, my fave Sunday breakfast! It was the rainiest day when we filmed these, and they instantly changed all of our moods. Can't wait for you to try them!

Ingredients 
- 100g porridge oats, 1 cup
- 200ml almond (or oat) milk, 1 cup
- 80g ground almonds, 1 cup 
- 2 very ripe bananas, mashed 
- 2 tablespoons maple syrup
- 1 tablespoon chia seeds
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- Pinch of salt 
- Coconut oil for cooking 

Method 
Pulse the oats into a flour, then add the flour to a bowl with the ground almonds, cinnamon, salt and chia seeds, mix well. Now add the almond milk, mashed bananas and maple syrup and mix well, until a pancake batter forms. 

Place a frying pan over a medium heat and add a tablespoon of coconut oil. Once warm, add a heaped tablespoon of the pancake mixture to the middle. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the bottom has cooked. Flip and cook on the other side for minute or so before stacking them and piling high with banana slices, almond butte

title: Creamy Mushroom Pasta | Deliciously Ella | Vegan
description:
This vegan mushroom pasta is the dream, it's filled with veggies and it's so creamy and warming. Plus it only takes 15 minutes from start to finish! Here's the recipe...

For the vegan mushroom pasta:
• 1 red onion
• 2 cloves garlic 
• 2 sticks celery
• 250g mushrooms 
• a big handful of spinach 
• Frozen peas
• A handful of fresh basil 
For the creamy cashew sauce 
• 200g roasted cashews
• Pinch cayenne pepper (optional) 
• 2 teaspoons of nutritional yeast 
• 200-300ml of oat milk (depending on how thick you want the sauce to be) 
• 1 teaspoon of tamari 
• 1/2 a lemon 
• salt and pepper

Method 
Blend all of the ingredients for the sauce and place to one side. 

Finely chop the onion, garlic and celery and add them to a large frying pan with the dried thyme, a sprinkling of salt and a drizzle of olive oil. Let this cook for 5-10 minutes until they've softened. While that cooks slice the mushrooms and put the pasta on to cook.

title: Fulgi de ovăz cu măr (rețetă pentru bebeluși de peste 8 luni)
description:
Bebelușei mele i-a plăcut foarte mult acest terci cu fulgi de ovăz și măr, deși nu am adăugat nici zahăr nici alt tip de îndulcitor, a ieșit neașteptat de dulce (eu credeam că va fi mai degrabă acrișor) mărul a fost Golden și a fost foarte dulce și parfumat, am mai adăugat și un pic de scorțișoară, dar e opțional.
Vă recomand să încercați rețeta și să îmi lăsați un mesaj cu părerea voastră. Spor la treabă!

⭐ Ingrediente:

    20g fulgi de ovăz
    150ml lapte
    jumătate de măr Golden (decojit și ras fin)
    un vârf de linguriță de scorțișoară (opțional)

title: Smântână vegană de caju homemade - Retetă Video!
description:
In video veti descoperi 2 variante de smantanica:

1. Prima variantă: Aceasta este făcută din caju, apă și probiotice. Probioticele folosite de mine sunt: https://www.secom.ro/jarro-dophilusfos-30cps
2. A doua variantă este preparată bineînțeles tot din caju + suc de lămâie pentru gustul acela acrișor, tipic smântânei. Această versiune este mai ușor de preparat deoarece nu trebuie să aștepți procesul de fermentare așa cum este în cazul variantei cu probiotice. Totuși trebuie să reținem că prima versiune de smântânică este mai apropiată ca și gust de versiunea originală.


Nucile caju au un conținut mare de grăsimi sănătoase. Aproximativ 75% dintre grăsimile conținute de nucile caju sunt acizi grași nesaturați ca și în cazul celor regăsiți în uleiul de măsline. Grăsimile mono - nesaturate conținute în caju aduc beneficii majore sănătății, inclusiv sănătății inimii. Caju-ul este bogat în cupru, mangan, triptofan, magneziu, fosfor.

title: Salata a la russe raw vegană!
description:
De foarte multă vreme doresc să postez această salată pe blog. Din punctul meu de vedere, această variantă este mult mai simplu de preparat decât salată a la russe tradițională . . .  dar deja v-am învățat cu rețete simple, deci nu mai este un lucru nou pentru voi hihihi :P


♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ ♥♥♥ 

V-am povestit și cu alte ocazii, că prin fierberea sau gătirea prelungită a legumelor, acestea își pierd o parte considerabilă de nutrienți. Eu am observat pe propria piele, că atunci când mănânc produse fresh, mă simt mult mai bine, mai energică, mai cu chef - ca să zic așa. Digestia este mult mai bună și overall mă simt mult mai pozitivă.
 
Așa că de ce nu? Printre toate mancarurile grele pe care le consumam de sarbatori - sa nu strecuram si o salata fresh si hranitoare :)

Încercați măcar 1 dată și o să vă convingeți singuri!

Gasiti reteta completa cu ingrediente si cantitati aici: http://dolcefarverde.ro/salata-la-russe-raw-vegana/

title: How to make OVERNIGHT OATS & PORRIDGE MIX | Terci de Ovaz cu Fructe
description:
❄ Rețeta in limba română : 
https://catadinca.wordpress.com/2018/05/19/terci-cu-fructe/#more-879

PORRIDGE MIX |
    500 g Oat Flakes
    500 g Fruits and Seeds Muesli
    100 g Psyllium Husk Powder
1. Add all ingredient to a food processor, coffee bean grinder or blender. 
2. Pulse until you get a fine consistency.
3. Store in a closed jar.

OVERNIGHT OATS :
    1 cup Porridge Mix
    1 cup Milk
    125 g Yogurt
    Dried Cranberries
    Mango, Kiwi
    Honey
    Cinnamon Powder
1. Whisk together the oats, milk and yogurt and place the mixture in sealed containers. 
2. Pop them in the fridge overnight.
3. In the morning, top with kiwi, mango, dried cranberries, cinnamon powder and a drizzle of honey.

title: OIL BRINJAL | Ennai Kathirikkai with Tomato Soup | Village Vegan Recipe | Simple Eggplant Recipe
description:
Today we cook Ennai katharikkai recipe in English OIL Brinjal. This brinjal recipe is one of the simple and tastiest recipe of my village. We also cook tomato soup with garlic and pepper which also a traditional simple recipe for my village peoples.

We use cold-pressed gingelly oil and eggplants as main ingredients and we did not add any masala to make this eggplant recipe. 

Oil brinjal curry and the tomato soup recipes are 100% vegan recipes and these are healthier too.

title: The wild world of carnivorous plants - Kenny Coogan
description:
Venus fly traps, bladderworts and sundews, oh my! Learn about carnivorous plants and their predatory antics to lure, trap and digest prey. 

--

Around the world there are more than 600 plant species that supplement a regular diet of sunlight, water and soil with insects, frogs and even rats. Flies, tadpoles and beetles fall prey to the remarkable, predatory antics of carnivorous plants. What exactly are carnivorous plants and how do they trap their prey? Kenny Coogan dives into the world of these flesh-eating tricksters. 

Lesson by Kenny Coogan, directed by Lisa LaBracio.

title: Can A Vegan Chocolate Chip Cookie Satisfy A Cookie Lover? | Goodful
description:
Get the Goodful Cookbook and discover dozens of new vegan-friendly recipes like this one: https://bzfd.it/349w4Hr

Browned “Butter” Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe — Don’t worry if you’re skipping the eggs and butter–these vegan chocolate chip cookies are out of this world! Make them for friends and family, or just for yourself. You won’t be sorry you did!

Makes 8-10 cookies  
Prep time: 10 minutes
Cook time: 25-28 minutes
Total time: 65-98 minutes

INGREDIENTS
3 ounces finely chopped pecans (about 1 cup)
¾ cup refined coconut oil, melted 
¾ cup dark brown sugar 
½ cup granulated sugar 
¼ cup unsweetened non-dairy milk of choice 
1 teaspoon vanilla extract 
1½ cups all-purpose flour 
½ teaspoon baking soda 
1½ teaspoons kosher salt 
1 3.5-ounce dark chocolate bar, chopped
½ cup semisweet chocolate chunks 

PREPARATION

title: La célula vegetal y sus partes - Ciencias Naturales - Vídeo educativo para niños
description:
Vídeos educativo para niños sobre la célula vegetal. Aprende qué es una célula vegetal, sus funciones, cómo consiguen su alimento. Además podrás descubrir qué es la membrana, qué es el citoplasma, qué son los cloroplastos,  qué es la clorofila, la mitocondria y mucho más. Este vídeo pertenece a una colección de Ciencias naturales para niños, en la que aprenderán conceptos de forma divertida. Ideal para Educación Primaria.

Si te gustan nuestros vídeos, descarga la app de "Smile and Learn". Descubrirás más de 3000 actividades entre juegos, cuentos interactivos y vídeos para niños creados por educadores. Todos el contenido está disponible en ESPAÑOL, INGLÉS, FRANCÉS, ITALIANO y PORTUGUÉS.

title: The Most Beautiful Fruits and Vegetables You’ve Never Seen
description:
Even if you are a fruit and veggie lover, chances are you’ve never heard of most, if any, of the produce grown on Aaron Choi’s Girl & Dug Farms in San Marcos, California. Badger Flame beet ring a bell? Butterfly sorrel? Oca? How about ice plant? We were stumped, too, but intrigued. Join us as we visit Aaron’s family farm to find out how he started growing all of these unfamiliar eats.

title: Why McDonald's Doesn't Have A Vegan Meat Burger In The US
description:
As consumer diets continue to shift toward healthier food, plant-based alternatives are becoming more and more popular. Fast-food chains like Burger King, White Castle, and Carl's Jr. are rolling out fake meat options. But will Mcdonald's - the world's most famous fast-food restaurant - jump on board?

In the 12 months ending in March 2019, restaurant operators increased purchases of plant based protein 36 percent. That's in an environment where foot traffic in restaurants has remained relatively flat since 2014.

Traditional veggie burgers started popping up on grocery store shelves in the 1980s. Restaurants added them to their menus as an easy option for vegetarian diners. But veggie burgers have also gotten a bad rap. Made with black beans, lentils or tofu, they don't really taste like a real burger. In fact, they're usually pretty tasteless. 

Beyond Meat and Impossible Foods are trying to change that. Their plant-based burgers mimic actual beef’s taste, texture and look. The Beyon

title: A Forest Garden With 500 Edible Plants Could Lead to a Sustainable Future | Short Film Showcase
description:
Instead of neat rows of monoculture, forest gardens combine fruit and nut trees, shrubs, herbs, vines and perennial vegetables together in one seemingly wild setting. This type of agroforestry mimics natural ecosystems and uses the space available in a sustainable way. UK-based Martin Crawford is one of the pioneers of forest gardening. Starting out with a flat field in 1994, his land has been transformed into a woodland and serves as an educational resource for others interested in forest gardening. This short film by Thomas Regnault focuses on Crawford's forest garden, which is abundant, diverse, edible, and might be one answer to the future of food systems.

title: Mimosa pudica - The humble plant
description:
Commonly known as the humble plant or the sensitive plant, Mimosa pudica has leaves that are sensitive to the touch, folding inwards when disturbed. They open a few minutes later. 

This botanical curiosity has been grown at the Oxford Botanic Garden since the late seventeenth century.

title: EASY Vegan Cheese Recipe ***ONLY 2 INGREDIENTS***
description:
LEARN HOW TO MAKE VEGAN CHEESE WITH 2 INGREDIENTS!

LAY HO MA everyone!  You're in for the ultimate treat.  Join me in this episode on how to make easy vegan cheese.  In fact, you only need two ingredients.  This vegan cheese is perfect for spreading on crackers, breads, and much more!

Ingredients:
2 1/2 cups of cashew milk
*if making cashew milk, blend 1/4 cup cashews with 2 cups water
2 tbsp lemon juice

Directions:
1. Heat up the cashew milk in a saucepan on medium heat.  Do not boil.
2. Add the lemon juice, and gently incorporate 
3. Turn off the heat, and let the mixture cool for 15-20min
4. Place a sieve onto a large mixing bowl and line the sieve with cheese cloth or a nut milk bag
5. Pour the mixture into the milk bag, and gently strain out some of the water
6. Fill a mason jar up with water, and place it on the bag to act as a weight
7. Place in fridge overnight
8. That's it!!

title: Carbón vegetal, cuándo y cómo tomarlo. Tu Farmacéutico Informa - #PlantasMedicinales
description:
Videoconsejo sanitario sobre el uso del carbón vegetal, para qué sirve y cuándo y cómo debemos tomar esta planta medicinal. Videoconsejo impartido por la farmacéutica, Milagros Olias, vocal de Plantas Medicinales del Colegio Oficial de Farmacéuticos de Sevilla. 

El carbón vegetal o carbón activado se obtiene generalmente a partir de las partes leñosas carbonizadas de árboles y arbustos que son sometidas a procesos especiales que tienen como finalidad aumentar su grado de porosidad.
También es frecuente su obtención a partir de la cáscara del coco, 

Desde el punto de vista químico 
se trata de un carbón prácticamente puro, con una estructura cristalina reticular similar a la del grafito.
Después de su carbonización, se somete a una preparación especial que aumenta su porosidad conﬁriéndole un fuerte poder de adsorción.

En España está su uso vía oral el carbón vegetal está autorizado para el tratamiento sintomático de los procesos diarreicos inespecíficos  y como para el alivio sintom
tags_str: para que sirve; como tomar; cuando tomar; prospecto; farmacia; consejo farmacéutico; farmacéutico; contraindicaciones; videoconsejo; tutorial; medicamento; principio activo; recomendaciones; CGCOF; Consejo General Colegios Farmacéuticos; Tu Farmaceutico Informa; consejo de salud; consejo sanitario; carbon vegetal; planta medicinal; plantas medicinales; fitoterapia; gases; cicatrizacion; diarrea; adsorcion; porosidad; carbon activado; carbon propiedades
summary:
Videoconsejo sanitario sobre el uso del carbón vegetal, para qué sirve y cuándo y cómo debemos tomar esta planta medicinal. El carbón vegetal o carbón activado se obtiene generalmente a partir de las partes leñosas carbonizadas de árboles y arbustos que son sometidas a procesos especiales que tienen como finalidad aumentar su grado de porosidad. En España está su uso vía oral el carbón vegetal está autorizado para el tratamiento sintomático de los procesos diarreicos inespecíficos  y como para el alivio sintomático de los gases. ADMINISTRACION
Para una correcta administración del carbón vegetal se recomienda ingerirlo con un poco de agua

PRECAUCION
A la hora de usar el carbón vegetal debe saberse que puede reducir la absorción de otros medicamentos administrados por vía oral.

title: ¿Cómo Dibujar una CÉLULA VEGETAL? 🔬🦠 Dibujo de una CÉLULA VEGETAL Paso a Paso 🧫
description:
🔬🦠 1- Dibuja el contorno de la célula: Comienza dibujando un contorno irregular que represente la forma de la célula. Las células vegetales suelen tener una forma angular y pueden tener una membrana celular claramente definida.

2- Añade la pared celular: Dentro del contorno, dibuja una línea adicional ligeramente más gruesa para representar la pared celular. La pared celular es una estructura rígida que proporciona soporte y protección a la célula vegetal.

3- Incluye los orgánulos característicos: Dentro de la célula, dibuja los orgánulos característicos, como los cloroplastos, que son los responsables de la fotosíntesis y le dan a las células vegetales su color verde distintivo. También puedes agregar el núcleo, las mitocondrias y la vacuola central, que almacena agua y nutrientes.

4- Añade detalles y etiquetas si lo deseas: Para agregar realismo y claridad, puedes añadir detalles adicionales, como etiquetas para cada orgánulo. Por ejemplo, puedes etiquetar los cloroplastos como "c

title: Ovenly's Secretly Vegan Salted Chocolate Chip Cookies | Genius Recipes
description:
This isn't just genius for a vegan chocolate chip cookie or in spite of it. This cookie, from Ovenly founders Agatha Kulaga and Erin Patinkin, can rest entirely on its own merits: its soft-bellied, chewy, caramelly-crisp-edged, rippled and incidentally vegan merits. SUBSCRIBE TO FOOD52 ►► https://f52.co/2HN7Dp8

Makes: approximately 18 cookies 
Prep time: 24 hrs 20 min 
Cook time: 13 min

INGREDIENTS
2 cups (250 grams) all-purpose flour
1 teaspoon baking powder
3/4 teaspoon baking soda
1/2 teaspoon fine salt
1 1/4 cups dark chocolate chips (we prefer chocolate with 60 percent cocoa content or higher—double-check the ingredients if you want to make sure they're vegan)
1/2 cup (100 grams) sugar
1/2 cup (110 grams) packed light or dark brown sugar (note: on photo shoot day, we used an especially dark vegan brown sugar)
1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon canola, grapeseed, or any other neutral oil
1/4 cup plus 1 tablespoon water
Coarse-grained sea salt or flaky sea salt like Maldon, for garnish

FU

title: How Air Plants Grow Without Soil | The New Yorker
description:
Air plants have no stems and don’t require soil to grow. They’re also related to . . . pineapples? We explore the ways in which air plants, or the genus Tillandsia, are much more than a millennial hobby—they are one of nature’s continually evolving species, and they’re an obsession that connects people all over the world.

title: Unt Vegan ■ 4 Ingrediente ■ Cultured Vegan Butter
description:
De ce să mai cumperi unt vegan, atunci când îl poți prepara acasă? Ai nevoie de doar 4 ingrediente. Am folosit blenderul imersibil pentru a obține o emulsie perfectă, și astfel am reușit să evit adăugarea de lecitină care este de obicei folosită la prepararea unturilor vegane.
🎉 Bingooo!  Cultured vegan butter with only 4 ingredients *without lecithin*

■  Ingrediente:
Cremă de caju maturată
- 75 g caju crud
- 160 ml apă
- 1 capsulă probiotice acidophilus
Unt maturat:
- 130 g cremă de caju maturată
- 250 g ulei de nucă de cocos fără gust (rafinat) - topit
- 64 g ulei cu gust neutru (ulei de rapiță / avocado / grapese)
- 1/4 linguriță sare
■  Preparare:
 Hidratați nucile caju 8 ore sau peste noapte.
Clătiți-le și mixați-le cu 160 ml apă și 1 capsulă acidophilus probiotic până devin cremă.
Transferați crema într-un borcan și acoperiți cu o pânză curată și lăsați-o la temperatura camerei cel puțin 24 de ore. Crema va fermenta puțin și va căpăta un gust acrișor.
Adăugați într-un vas uleiul
tags_str: unt vegan maturat; unt vegan; reteta de unt vegan; cultured vegan butter; vegan cultured butter; cashew cultured butter; cashew butter; homemade butter; unt; unt de post; how to make butter; how to make cultured butter; how to make vegan butter; butter without lecithin; butter with probiotics; probiotic butter; probiotic; reteta de unt de post; easy vegan butter recipe; 4 ingredients butter; ulei de cocos; ulei de avocado; probiotice acidophilus; unt de casa
summary: Add to an immersion blender jar the melted coconut oil, 130 g cultured cashew cream, neutral oil and salt. Mix the first 30 seconds at the bottom of the jar. Transfer the mixture into an container and place in the fridge (freezer) until firm. Keep the vegan butter for up to 7 days in the refrigerator and up to 2 months in the freezer.

title: Lapte vegetal de ovaz! Super simplu de preparat!
description:
Ovăzul conține fier, magneziu, zinc, seleniu - este bogat în proteine conține toți cei 9 aminoacizi esențiali organismului. Acesta reduce colesterolul, întărește sistemul imunitar și este bogat în antioxidanți. 

Este mult mai simplu și mai economic să prepari laptele de ovăz acasă decât să îl cumperi de la magazin. Pe lângă motivul evident economic, varianta de lapte homemade este și mult mai sănătoasă.

De ce? Din păcate laptele din comerț conține tot felul de ingrediente (conservanți, uleiuri, zahăr sau sare) care ajută la prelungirea perioadei de valabilitate, dar care nu sunt tocmai sănătoase.

title: Ciorbă de perișoare ■ vegan ■ de post ■ Soyballs soup
description:
Ciorbă de perișoare din soia  😍 O vei prepara foarte ușor și fără emoții că perișoarele se vor desface la fiert. Vor ieși perfecte! Nici prea tari și nici prea moi, iar felul în care se vor ridica la suprafață te va face să zâmbești ca-n copilărie. 
E un deli-ciu servită cu smântână vegetală și cu ardei iuți. 
O ciorbă de perișoare de post ca la buni acasă.
Delicious romanian Soyball soup with sauerkraut juice. A taste to remember 📝

Take a peek on my Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/CruFree
■ Ingrediente
Pentru perișoare:
- 100 g soia granule
- 100 g orez alb cu bob rotund
- 1 lingură ulei
- 100 g ceapă (o ceapă mică)
- 3 linguri făină de in
- 4 linguri făină de ovăz
- 2 linguri făină albă de grâu
- 2 linguri tărâțe de psyllium ( din semințele plantei Plantago care crește și în flora spontană)
- 2 lingurițe sare 
- 1 linguriță piper negru
Pentru ciorbă:
- 2 linguri ulei
- 3 litri de apă
- 150 g ceapă (o ceapă mijlocie)
- 100 g morcovi (2 morcovi)
- 50 g păstârnac (1 păstârnac)
tags_str: ciorba de perisoare; ciorba de perisoare de post; ciorba de perisoare cu smantana; ciorba de perisoare ardeleneasca; ciorba de perisoare cu moare de varza; ciorba de perisoare acrita cu zeama de varza; ciorba de perisoare de post cu soia; reteta vegana; ciorba de perisoare vegane; vegan peek; ciorba de perisoare vegetariana; ciorba de perisoare vegana; soyball soup; vegan soup dumplings; vegan soup; ciorba vegana; ciorba de post; ciorba de perisoare de soia; soia; asmr; romania
summary:
Delicious romanian Soyball soup with sauerkraut juice. - la final se adauga piperul și verdeața 
- se servește cu smântână de caju (rețeta aici: https://youtu.be/EiQG94dopWU) sau smântână vegetală din comerț 
Merge excelent și cu murătură de ardei iuți 🌶. ■ Ingredients
Soyballs:
- 100 g soya granules
- 100 g white rice, round grain
- 1 tablespoon oil
- 100 g onion (a small onion)
- 3 tablespoons flax seed flour
- 4 tablespoons of oat flour
- 2 tablespoons of white wheat flour
- 2 tablespoons of psyllium husk 
- 2 teaspoons of salt
- 1 teaspoon black pepper
Soup:
- 2 tablespoons oil
- 3L of water
- 150 g onion (one onion)
- 100 g of carrot (2 carrots)
- 50 g parnsip root (1 parnsip)
- 50 g parsley  root(1 parsley)
- 50 g celerly root (1 small slice)
- 150 g of bell pepper (1 pepper)
- hot sauerkraut juice(between 200 and 500 ml) to taste 
- tomato paste optional
- pepper
- parsley or tarragon to taste
- caju cream (recipe here: https://youtu.be/EiQG94dopWU) or any kind of vegetable cream
■ Preparation:
Soyballs:
- soak the soya granules for 20 minutes
- In the meantime boil the rice in one liter of water and drain
- cook the onion for 5 minutes until it becomes translucent
- Combine all the ingredients and form the soyballs (about 40 with a diameter of 2 cm )
Soup:
- saute the onion for 5 minutes in 2 tablespoons of oil
- Add the roots and cook for 5 minutes
- add the pepper and cook for 5 minutes
- In a pot of 3 liters of boiling water add the vegetables and cook for 5 minutes
- Add hot sauerkraut juice (to prevent the soup from stop boiling ) + optional tomato sauce and lower fire flame
- add the soyballs one by one and let them boil (5-10 minutes) until they float to the top. - finally add pepper and greens
- serve with cream cheese (recipe here: https://youtu.be/EiQG94dopWU) or commercial vegetable cream

title: How to use Tamarind Paste for PAD THAI | EASY VEGAN RECIPES
description:
Ingredients:
1 block tamarind (package may say seedless)

Directions:
1. Bring a pot of water to boil
2. Tear the tamarind block into pieces and place them in a large bowl
3. Pour over enough hot water to just cover the tamarind and let it sit for 30min (cool enough to touch)
4. Massage the tamarind for a min
5. Pour the mixture (in batches) through a sieve and into another bowl.  Use a spoon to press through and to scrape the bottom of the sieve
6. Transfer the mixture to a pot on medium high heat and cook for 5-8min stirring constantly
7. Transfer the paste to a glass container and keep in the fridge up to several months

title: Terci de ovăz cu morcovi și lapte de migdale
description:
Terciul de ovăz este știut ca fiind o mâncare nutritivă, fie că este servit la micul dejun, fie ca desert. Totuși îl putem face și mai gustos, și mai interesant, și mai nutritiv. Cum? Folosind lapte de migdale, îndulcindu-l cu sirop de arțar și cu morcovi rași, aromatizându-l cu scorțișoară, ghimbir și vanilie, și în sfârșit, servindu-l presărat cu fulgi de cocos deshidratat și de migdale.

title: FUR IS DEAD fashion show | Vegan in Cluj-Napoca
description:
In timp ce alte tari au interzis fermele de blana, in Romania aceasta cruda industrie continua sa existe, sa imulteasca, tortureze și să ucidă sute de mii de nurci, vulpi, chinchile, iepuri precum și alte animale in fiecare an pentru a face profit de pe pielea lor. Animalele din aceste ferme își petrec viața în cuști mici de sarma. Uciderea acestor animale se face prin înjunghiere, sufocare, electrocutare, gazare, otravire. In multe tari au fost filmate cazuri in care animalele încă mai erau conștiente după ce au fost jupuite. Aceasta industrie mai are și un impact ecologic rau, emisiile de CO2 pentru o blana naturala sunt intre 3-20x mai mari decât pentru o varianta artificiala faux fur. Aceasta varianta sintetica este mult mai ușor reciclata acum decât în trecut. Acum poți fi confortabil și cool cu aceste variante faux fur care se găsesc peste tot. Este timpul ca și Romania sa puna capăt acestei industrii și să o facă istorie!

#FurFreeRomania

While other countries are banning fur f
summary: Aceasta industrie mai are și un impact ecologic rau, emisiile de CO2 pentru o blana naturala sunt intre 3-20x mai mari decât pentru o varianta artificiala faux fur. Fur farmers use the cruelest killing methods available, including suffocation, electrocution, gas, and poison. Cruelty-free fabrics and faux furs are available in stores everywhere. It's time for Romania to make fur history and ban fur farming.

Sadhya - Is a traditional Indian vegetarian banquet feast originating in Kerala, India. It’s not just a meal, but it’s an entire event, an experience of vegetarian food, natural ingredients and combinations of Ayurvedic medicinal values. There’s so much tradition involved, from the way you mix and match your different dishes, to the way you order your different dishes, and mix the sweets and salty dishes.

I can say without a doubt, this was the best vegetarian food I’ve ever had in my life. It was a meal experience.

Mothers Veg Plaza - Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. Price - 200 INR ($2.78) per person, all you can eat. But usually by the first round of all the dishes, everyone is pretty full. I had a few more helpings of rice and curry to end this spectacular Indian food vegetarian feast.

title: El CARBONERO. Transformación de 10.000 kg de leña en CARBÓN VEGETAL en la naturaleza | Documental
description:
EL #CARBONERO | Hilario Artigas, vecino de #Agüero (#Huesca), fue un gran sabio rural, conocedor de muchas de las técnicas necesarias para aprovechar los recursos del #monte. Uno de los muchos oficios que pudimos recuperar con él en nuestros documentales fue el de carbonero. En el año 1999 estuvimos con él para ver cómo era este oficio de transformar la #leña de #carrasca en #carbón vegetal. #Documental

Si te ha gustado este documental, puedes mostrar tu APOYO y AYUDA para que el canal siga creciendo con los botones “Gracias” y “Miembro de Canal” que aparecen debajo de cada vídeo.

También puedes conocer más sobre mi vida, trabajo y trayectoria en este DOCUMENTAL BIOGRÁFICO: https://youtu.be/894-p-ttwwI

title: Homemade Gummy Candy/Gummy Bear Recipe without Gelatine by Tiffin Box | Vegan Gummibärchen with agar
description:
Hello...welcome to Tiffin Box. Today's recipe is easy and quick homemade gummy candy / gummy bear without Gelatine. Today I'm using Agar-agar powder instead of gelatin which is vegan, but you can also use gelatin for sure. 
Fresh fruit juice/ store-bought juice can be used for this recipe. Here I used store-bought orange juice for yellow gummy, Grape juice for red gummy, 7-up for white gummy, and Lemon water with food color for Green Gummy.
You can adjust sugar according to your taste and sweetness of the juice that you used..!

Ingredients :
Any type of fruit juice/lemonade/water - 1/2 cup
Agar agar powder - 1 tblsp  
(Available on US Amazon: https://amzn.to/497SdK8
Available on UK Amazon: https://amzn.to/3MtMJRn)
Sugar - 2 to 5 tblsp
food color can be added......

title: How Plants Caused the First Mass Extinction
description:
PBS Member Stations rely on viewers like you. To support your local station, go to http://to.pbs.org/DonateEons
↓ More info below ↓
Check out Journey to the Microcosmos: https://youtube.com/microcosmos

In the middle of the Cambrian, life on land was about to get a little more crowded. And those newcomers would end up changing the world. The arrival of plants on land would make the world colder, drain much of the oxygen out of the oceans and eventually, it would help cause a massive extinction event.

Thanks to Fabrizio de Rossi for the excellent illustration of early terrestrial plants. You can find more of Fabrizio’s work here: https://www.facebook.com/ArtofFabricious/

And special thanks to Paul Strother for sending us an incredibly cool photo of an Ordovician plant spore for this video. Check out Paul’s website here:https://sites.google.com/bc.edu/paulkstrothersbcwebsite/home

Credit for Paleogeographic Map: Scotese, C.R., 2019. Plate Tectonics, Paleogeography, and Ice Ages, YouTub

1 tbs berbera (1 የሾርባ ማንኪያ በርበሬ)

description:

«Де брати білок? Де ти береш B12?Людина - хижак, без м’яса ти не зможеш!»
Мою пісню #VEGAN я написала для участі в нацвідборі Євробачення 2020! Написана вона була за два місяці до того, як VOGUE UKRAINE в статті написали про те, що 2020 рік офіційно оголошений роком Вегана! Співпадіння?  

Яку пісню як глядач я завжди хотіла відправити на Євро? Для мене як для людини, яка відправляє свою цінну смску за учасника-фаворита, конкурс є способом спілкування з іншими народами! І мені так хотілося завжди показати, що про наш менталітет існує багато стереотипів — і багато з них неправда!

title: In cautarea adevarului(06.02.2020) - Editia 204 | Sezonul 3 | Luni - vineri, de la 13:00, la Kanal D
description:
In cautarea adevarului(06.02.2020) - Editia 204 | Sezonul 3 | Luni - vineri, de la 13:00, la Kanal D

In aceasta editie ,,In cautarea adevarului" facem cunostinta in prima faza cu Andrei si Corina. Cei doi sunt impreuna de 11 ani si de 3 ani, din anumite motive pe care le vom afla pe parcurs, au hotarat sa devina vegani, adica nu mananca decat legume, fructe si seminte neprocesate termic. Acelasi stil de alimentatie i l-au impus si fetitei lor de 10 ani pe care o cheama Miruna. 

Bunica Mirunei, mama Corinei, nu este de acord cu stilul lor de viata. 
Plecati cu munca intr-un alt oras, Corina si Andrei o lasa pe micuta in grija bunicii, si asa cum am zis mai sus, ea nu este de acord cu veganismul..asa ca ii da nepoatei sa manance de toate, de la carne, la lapte, la branza si multe produse interzise de Andrei si de Corina. 

Aflam in cele din urma, ca atat Andrei, cat si Corina, nu au vrut sa faca o aduca pe lume pe Corina, iar faptul ca ei sunt vegani, nu este o alegere facuta din iubir
tags_str: Editia 204; Luni - vineri; de la 13:00; la Kanal D; ochii din umbra; tinere ajunse pe mana traficantilor de carne vie; isi doreste un copil; in cautarea mamei naturale; Pentru ca sotia a nascut doar fete; barbatul isi intemeiaza o a doua familie!; puterea dragostei; In cautarea adevarului(06.02.2020); tradare; secrete murdare; gelozie; amenintare
summary: Bunica Mirunei, mama Corinei, nu este de acord cu stilul lor de viata. Aflam in cele din urma, ca atat Andrei, cat si Corina, nu au vrut sa faca o aduca pe lume pe Corina, iar faptul ca ei sunt vegani, nu este o alegere facuta din iubire pentru animale, ci din comoditate. Alaturi de parintii ei, Miruna este in mare pericol, iar bunica este pregatita sa ia atitudine. Deznodamantul este socant!

title: Vegan Ramen Broth | Veggie Stock Recipe | Base for Ramen Noodles!
description:
LEARN HOW TO MAKE AN EASY VEGAN RAMEN BROTH BASE FROM SCRATCH FOR NOODLES

LAY HO MA!!  This simple veggie stock is delicious and easy to make.  If you make this ahead of time, then you're ready to make some incredible vegan ramen.  Join me in this episode and learn how to make an easy vegan ramen broth recipe from scratch.  Let's begin.

Ingredients:
1 large onion
1 garlic bulb
3 tbsp olive oil
4 sticks celery
1 fuji apple (or any other kind you have)
1 potato
5-6 cremini mushrooms
2 tbsp Himalayan pink salt
10g kombu
3L water (12 cups)

Directions:
1. Peel and roughly chop the onion.  Slice the whole garlic bulb in half
2. Heat a stock pot to medium heat.  Add a good drizzle of olive oil
3. Add in the onions and garlic.  Sauté for 5-8min
4. Roughly chop the celery and add to the pot.  Dice the apple and add to the pot
5. Sauté for another 5-8min
6. Dice the potato and slice the mushrooms.  Add them to the pot followed by the pink salt
7. Add about 10g of kombu to the pot followed by

title: FALAFEL FLATBREAD | amazing vegan flatbread recipe
description:
Falafel flatbread is a vegan and gluten-free bread made from a blend of herbs, vegetables, and chickpeas. It's a unique take on a traditional flatbread that's bursting with fresh and savory Mediterranean flavors. If you combined my socca flatbread recipe and my falafel recipe, then cut it into squares, this is what you get. A delicious, healthy recipe!

My favorite part about this recipe is the falafel flatbread's versatility. You can dip it into hummus, use it as sandwich bread, or pile on tons of fresh toppings. Make sure to check out the blog post on the website for the full recipe and more topping ideas. Enjoy!

title: Receta vegana fácil - Corn Dogs Vegusta *MÍRALO*
description:
Hoy les traemos una sencilla y deliciosa receta, muy conocida en EEUU. Esta es la versión vegana de los Corn Dogs!!!

Estos son los ingredientes:
- 150 grs de harina blanca
- 150 grs de harina de maíz (la harina que se usa para hacer arepas)
- 2 cdas de polvos de hornear
- 2 cdas de azúcar rubia
- 1 cda de sal de mar
- 375 ml de leche de soya
- 125 ml de aquafaba (es el líquido de la cocción de los garbanzos)

Paso a paso:
- Debes mezclar todos los ingredientes en un bowl , primero los secos y luego incorporar los líquidos. Revolver hasta tener una masa homogénea y sin grumos. Trata de poner la masa en un recipiente largo para poder untar las vienesas con facilidad.
- Secar las vienesas y empolvar con harina blanca, es importante que estén bien secas.
- Atravesar las vienesas con palitos de brochetas (quizás debas cortar los palitos para que entren en tu sartén). También puedes partir las vienesas a la mitad para hacer mini corn dogs.
- Untar las vienesas en la masa que preparaste en e

title: SAMURAI BURGER like McDonald's but VEGAN! #Shorts
description:
VEGAN SAMURAI BURGER! #Shorts
 
This will be the first installment of my quest to VEGANIZE the most popular McDonald’s Burgers around the world! This one is super easy and unique and obviously super delicious! 
 
All you gotta do is cook up a plant-based patty (I used Impossible) then brush on some Teriyaki sauce. The mayo sauce I made is just some vegan mayo mixed with a little rice vinegar and sesame oil. I didn’t do exact measurements, but a little dab'll do ya!
 
Then just toast your buns and chop up some lettuce, and assemble and dig in!
 
As THEE BURGER DUDE, my goal is to show vegans and non-vegans alike how to make easy, vegan comfort food!

title: Snake plant soil propagation
description:
I used sand to improve drainage of the soil. Sand is excellent for improving drainage. You can find sand of different sizes, it's better to use medium to coarse sand (0.25 - 2mm) as it provides larger pore space. The problem is it's very heavy, so you can't use a lot of it, and you can't use it in large pots, as they become very difficult to manipulate. 

Since there is no drainage hole on this pot, I had to water very carefully, not too much. I'll post updates with the growth :) 

These cuttings will revert back to sansevieria trifasciata. If you want to keep the same plant, you need to propagate with a piece of the rhizome.

Rețeta de salată a la russe, salată rusească  sau salată Olivier este adaptabilă și spornică, cea mai cunoscută variantă a sa fiind rețeta de salată de boeuf pe care toată România o adoră. Mai multe detalii despre rețetă și despre produsele D'Aucy pe care le-am folosit pentru realizarea acesteia găsiți în articolul de pe blog, aici: https://www.lauralaurentiu.ro/retete-culinare/retete-de-salate/salata-a-la-russe-reteta-de-post-cu-maioneza-vegana-video.html

Pentru salata a la russe de post, am o maioneză de post făcută din aquafaba, lichidul concentrat din năutul conservat. 🔹 Mai multe rețete de aperitive găsiți aici: https://www.lauralaurentiu.ro/tag/aperitiv-rece

title: Types of Plant Cells
description:
If we want to learn about plant structure and function, we have to start with the smallest components, and those would be plant cells. Just like animals, plants are made of eukaryotic cells of different types, and in plants these are called meristematic cells, parenchyma cells, collenchyma cells, and sclerenchyma cells. What are these different types of plant cells and what are their functions? Let's find out!

Script by Sheryl Hosler

title: Vegan Spicy Noodle Soup Recipe | EASY Dinner Meal Idea!
description:
LEARN HOW TO MAKE THIS EASY VEGAN SPICY NOODLE SOUP RECIPE!

LAY HO MA!!  Maybe its because I'm Asian lol, but I absolutely love noodles.  I also love spicy food, so it was only natural that a spicy noodle soup episode was going to be filmed!  If you like pho or ramen, you will love this too!  Join me and learn how to make an easy vegan spicy noodle soup!

Ingredients:
1 shallot
2 pieces garlic
small piece ginger
drizzle of olive oil
1/2 daikon radish 
1 tomato
handful of fresh shiitake mushrooms
1 tbsp cane sugar
2 tbsp chili oil
2 tbsp sichuan broad bean paste (dobanjuang)
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp rice vinegar 
4 cups veggie stock
handful of snow peas
handful enoki mushrooms
1 cup firm tofu
2 portions thin rice noodles
2 sticks green onion
few sprigs cilantro
1 tbsp white sesame seeds

Directions:

title: Șnițele de pleurotus - Reteta vegana (de post) - Paula Seling
description:
Esti curios sa afli mai multe despre mancarea vegana? Ai nimerit unde trebuie! Paula Seling iti prezinta cu pasiune si umor retete vegane (de post), testate de ea, pentru un stil de viata sanatos. Aceste mancaruri pot fi preparate cu costuri mici, de catre oricine, ideea de baza fiind ca un stil de viata vegan poate fi la indemana oricui. Incearca si tu retetele si spune-ne in comentarii cum au iesit. Pentru a primi retete noi, nu uita sa dati subscribe canalului de YouTube!

Ciupercile pleurotus se spală, se zvântă, se îndepărtează cotoarele, se întind pe o planșetă și se condimentează (sare, piper, boia, usturoi ras, se stropesc cu puțin ulei)
Se lasă în frigider la odihnă, într-un castronel până de pătrund de arome. Se prepară un amestec de consistența aluatului de clătite din lapte de migdale, făină albă sau neagră (după preferință), sare, piper, boia, usturoi, pătrunjel mărunțit. 
Se plimbă ciupercile prin făină, apoi prin compoziția de mai sus, se așează în tigaia cu ulei bine în

title: Mancare de LINTE VERDE CU LEGUME 🥬👉 VEGAN
description:
Astazi am prezentat o mancare de LINTE DE POST, cu legume.O super reteta de tocanita de LINTE VERDE.🥬🥗 o reteta de linte spaniola. O mancare de linte scazuta pentru cei ce au un stil de viata VEGAN.🥬🥗🧄🥔 Nu am adaugat carnat din respect pentru eprietenii mei gurmandzi care postesc si au un stil de viata sanatos. #lasebiacasa😘

Ingrediente folosite pentru reteta de linte:

400gr linte verde
1 ceapa
80 gr ardei gras verde
80 gr ardei gras rosu
1 morcov
1 carof
100 gr praz
100 gr dovlecel
1 rosie
1 tulpina telina verde (80-100gr)
3-4 catei de usturoi
1 lingurita sare
1-2 foi de dafin
1 lingurita de boia de ardei rosu dulce
1/2 lingurita piper negru
50 ml ulei de masline
sare dupa gust

👉Vezi reteta de ciorba de linte Rosie👉 https://youtu.be/l-ftELW0AOo
